== Notes for [[Item:Q110207|Q110207]] ==

58. MUHAMMAD-ALWI-13.
was born in 390h-Basmal, Yemen and died in 446h-Bayt Jubair, Yemen.
Reference Link: http://freepages.family.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~naqobatulasyrof/main/des/d13.htm#i13
Reference Link: http://familytreemaker.genealogy.com/users/a/s/y/Naqobatul-Asyrof-Jakarta/WEBSITE-0001/UHP-0013.html

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
